bug_report.summary: Urlbar autocomplete panel shows extra blank space below “This time, search with:” row
steps_to_reproduce: Open a tab where the address bar autocomplete can open (e.g., click the address bar while on about:config as in the screenshot).
Type a value (e.g., “about:config” or any text) so the urlbar autocomplete panel opens with results and the “This time, search with:” row is visible at the bottom.
expected_behaviors: The autocomplete panel height should tightly fit its contents; the “This time, search with:” row should sit at the bottom edge of the panel without an extra empty region beneath it.
actual_behaviors: An extra blank white area appears beneath the “This time, search with:” row, increasing the panel height and leaving unused space at the bottom.

false_positive_reasons: LLM hallucination — misinterpreted or imagined GUI rendering
